professional_info.coaching_title: Integrated Health and Functional Medicine Coach

about.story: For several years my health declined. Like you, I went to several doctors and was prescribed different medications. However, the pharmaceuticals only treated some of the symptoms but did not resolve the underlying issues. Until I discovered functional medicine. Which is why I have left working in the stock markets, so that I can also help other people.
about.who_you_help: Clients who have ongoing issues that doctors have not been able to diagnose, such as fatigue but no real reason that they cannot define, a cough that cannot be explained and no prescription works, insomnia and no one can figure out why.
about.what_makes_you_different: My approach is different, as I have been my first client.

services.whats_included: 12 weekly video calls, email support, workbook — 3 months total.

social_proof.common_concerns: I can't afford it, Will this really work for me?, I don't have time, I've tried everything already, I'm not sure I'm ready

branding.website_feel: Warm and nurturing, Calm and peaceful, Professional and credible

call_to_action.how_to_start: Not sure yet (help me decide) — generic Get Started CTA
call_to_action.website_goal: Get people to book calls with me
